content: Worktree naming: branch = overstory/{agentName}/{taskId}, path = {baseDir}/{agentName}. Creation via git worktree add -b; rollback via git worktree remove --force + git branch -D (best-effort cleanup). Worktree status tracked: exists (path exists), hasUncommittedChanges (git status --porcelain). List via git worktree list --porcelain; merge check via git merge-base --is-ancestor.
